layer.vendor_layer_descriptor: AI-supervised PM workspace with multi-layer governance for SDD pipelines

surfaces.description: Append-only JSONL audit trail per agent action
Risk-scored verification gates plus Code Review Court
Truth Tribunal plus signed PRs post-bind stabilization

does: Multi-judge tribunal validation (Truth Tribunal 7 judges, Code Review Court 4-5 judges, Recommendation Tribunal 4 judges)
5-layer data sovereignty enforcement via Savia Shield
Append-only JSONL audit trail per agent action
Spec-Driven Development with mandatory human review at E1 gate
75 specialized agents with explicit capability boundaries
Autonomous mode with double opt-in and human reviewer gate
does_not: Issue legal or forensic certifications of any kind
Substitute human review in critical decisions (Rule 8 CLAUDE.md, E1 gate is always human)
Guarantee absence of hallucinations — only detects and reduces via Truth Tribunal
Act as regulatory compliance authority (GDPR, EU AI Act, AEPD — external frameworks apply)
Process confidential data in cloud without Savia Shield enforcement
Approve or merge pull requests autonomously
Execute destructive infrastructure changes without human approval

claims_boundary.authoritative_layer_claim: Savia provides multi-layer pre-merge governance for AI-agent-driven software delivery pipelines, with mandatory human review at risk-classified gates declared in docs/rules/domain/verification-policy.md
explicit_non_claims: Savia does NOT certify legal validity of any output
Savia does NOT substitute for human judgment at E1 decision gates
Savia does NOT guarantee hallucination-free outputs
Savia does NOT act as authority on GDPR, EU AI Act, or AEPD compliance
Savia does NOT process confidential data outside its Shield boundary without explicit opt-in
Savia does NOT provide forensic evidence for legal proceedings
Savia does NOT issue financial, legal, or medical advice
claims_boundary.consumer_boundary_constraint: Outputs of Savia governance layers are operational evidence and pre-merge gates. They are not legal certifications, regulatory attestations, or substitutes for human review at decision gates declared in docs/rules/domain/verification-policy.md. Any downstream consumer integrating Savia outputs into compliance workflows must apply their own regulatory layer.
